query:
they updated the design... look and evaluate again. Vision alignment: 4 PASS · 2 WARN · 0 FAIL · 1 VARIANCE (resolved —                
  architecture/spec contradiction on AC-12 test placement corrected to typed_graph.rs
   + SqlxStore)                                                                      
                                                                                  
  Risks requiring delivery attention:                                                
  - R-01 (High): Run EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN on back-fill SQL before merge — confirm
  UNIQUE index covers NOT EXISTS sub-join                                            
  - R-02 (Critical): Gate-3b must grep for "no duplicate" in tick tests — its     
  presence is a missed update                                                        
  - R-08 (Critical): All edge count assertions in tick tests change from N pairs → 2N
   edges; 8 tests + 3 new Group I tests affected

entries.title: read.rs test helper create_graph_edges_table is for pre-v13 schema only — new cohesion tests must not call it
Schema migration tests must include old-schema databases, not only fresh ones
SQL pseudocode with JOIN-heavy queries must be traced against explicit scenarios before Gate 3a approval
Risk-based test strategy predicted and caught COUNT DISTINCT bug at implementation time
ADR-004 addendum (bugfix-444): TypedRelationGraph rebuild must filter to exclude Quarantined entries
